name: smugglr
description: Content-hashed delta sync for SQLite, in the browser

scripts.build:copy-wasm: mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp ../../crates/smugglr-wasm/pkg/smugglr_wasm.js dist/wasm/ && cp ../../crates/smugglr-wasm/pkg/smugglr_wasm.d.ts dist/wasm/ && cp ../../crates/smugglr-wasm/pkg/smugglr_wasm_bg.wasm dist/wasm/ && cp ../../crates/smugglr-wasm/pkg/smugglr_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts dist/wasm/
scripts.build: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:ts && pnpm build:copy-wasm

author: Sean Silvius
